description_long: This is a heavily armored, four-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a distinct angular hull and turret, designed for urban and battlefield operations. The exterior is covered in a multi-tone camouflage pattern consisting of white, brown, and gray geometric shapes, providing visual disruption. The front features a sloped glacis plate, headlamps, and a prominent gun barrel mounted on a rotating turret. The sides display large, rugged tires with deep treads, reinforced wheel arches, and access hatches. The rear includes storage compartments, exhaust outlets, and a license plate, while the roof is equipped with periscopes, antennae, and additional hatches. The vehicle's construction suggests a steel or composite armored shell, with visible rivets and panel lines indicating modular armor sections.
description: A four-wheeled, angular armored combat vehicle with a multi-tone camouflage pattern, turret-mounted gun, and rugged off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, headlamps, and the main gun protruding from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large, rugged tires, side hatches, and the full length of the turret and hull.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals storage compartments, exhausts, and a license plate, with the angular armor extending to the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tires, side panels, and turret details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible turret-mounted gun barrel on the roof; no other weapon mounts or hardpoints visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating; sloped panels on the front, sides, and rear; visible modular sections and reinforced wheel arches.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Geometric camouflage pattern in white, brown, and gray with sharp, angular shapes.
attribute_military_markings: White license plate with black alphanumeric code on the rear; no other visible insignia or symbols.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, rugged tread pattern; reinforced sidewalls visible.
